---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for hw-monitor
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include any mockups or examples if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references (e.g. similar features in other tools like htop, btop, GNOME System Monitor).
